phrases.text_local: Onde começa a fila de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH FEE-luh DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: Taxis are strictly regulated and queued outdoors to maintain terminal flow.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Taxi Rank Outside.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh tuhk-SEE RAHNNGK oowt-SEE-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Taxi Rank Outside.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Taxi Rank Outside.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh tuhk-SEE RAHNNGK oowt-SEE-dih.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Taxi Rank Outside.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi rank is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a praça de táxis?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DIH TAHK-seesh?
phrases.cultural_note: At Faro Airport, the taxi rank is directly outside the arrivals hall. Staff typically point toward the exit.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a zona de aluguer de carros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ZOH-nuh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Zona de Aluguer de Carros.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Car Rental Zone.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Car Rental Zone.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ZOH-nuh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Zona de Aluguer de Carros.

phrases.text_local: Onde é que o Aerobus parte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH AW uhih-roo-BOOSH PAH-ruh-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize directness and spatial references over pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a paragem de autocarro no exterior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH ow-too-KAH-roo NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the bus stop outside.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the bus stop outside.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-RAH-zhayng DIH ow-too-KAH-roo NOO ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a paragem de autocarro no exterior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Car Rental Zone
phrases.text_local: Como posso chegar à zona de aluguer de carros?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo PAW-soo shih-GAHR AH ZOH-nuh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH KAH-roosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Wayfinding relies on color-coded signage and floor-level references.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no nível das chegadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO NEE-vehl DUHSH sheh-GAH-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, on the arrivals level.

responses.english: Good morning, on the arrivals level.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO NEE-vehl DUHSH sheh-GAH-duhsh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no nível das chegadas.
